subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book hath appeared on the Day of Return; grievous to the hearts of the factions hath it come. Say: That which was revealed aforetime hath caused anguish to them that are veiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب آمد در یوم ماب آمد رغم دل احزاب آمد قل ما نزل من قبل محتجبان را دردی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
